name: SmartOnFhirV2DiscoveryContentTypeJson
title: SMART on FHIR v2 — discovery document is application/json
description: Per SMART App Launch IG v2 §5.1, the .well-known/smart-configuration document is JSON. The Content-Type SHALL be a JSON media type — application/json, application/json; charset=utf-8, or application/fhir+json (RFC 6839 +json suffix grammar). Servers returning text/html or application/xml indicate routing or content-negotiation bugs.

assert.label: contentType is a JSON media type (application/json or application/*+json)
